name: Notification Service
description: A scalable, multi-channel notification service supporting email, SMS, push notifications, and in-app alerts with templating, delivery tracking, and retry logic.
vision: Build a reliable notification infrastructure that guarantees delivery across all channels with exactly-once semantics and real-time tracking.
architecture: Microservices architecture with Kafka for event ingestion, dedicated workers per channel (SES for email, SNS for SMS, Firebase for push), PostgreSQL for delivery logs, and Redis for rate limiting and deduplication.
features: Delivery status tracking and webhook callbacks
Rate limiting per channel and per recipient
Retry with exponential backoff and dead-letter queues
lessons: Designing for idempotency early prevents duplicate delivery issues
Channel health monitoring is critical for failover logic
deploymentStrategy: Blue-green deployment on Kubernetes with canary analysis for notification channels

description: A full-stack e-commerce platform with product catalog, shopping cart, order management, payment processing, and inventory management.
name: E-Commerce Platform
vision: Create a modular, event-driven e-commerce backbone that supports multi-tenant deployments and handles peak traffic without degradation.
architecture: Modular monolith with clear bounded contexts (Catalog, Cart, Orders, Payments, Inventory). Event-driven communication between modules via RabbitMQ. PostgreSQL for transactional data, Elasticsearch for product search, and Redis for session and cart caching.
features: Product catalog with categories, variants, and search
Shopping cart with persistent and guest modes
Admin dashboard for product and order management
lessons: Eventual consistency in inventory requires careful UX to avoid overselling
Bounded contexts help keep the monolith maintainable as features grow
deploymentStrategy: Incremental rollout with feature flags and database migration automation

description: A real-time collaborative task management system with Kanban boards, sprint planning, time tracking, and team analytics.
name: Task Management System
vision: Deliver an intuitive, high-performance project management tool that supports agile methodologies with real-time collaboration.
architecture: React frontend with WebSocket connections for real-time updates. Spring Boot backend with PostgreSQL for persistence. Event sourcing for task activity log and CQRS for separating read and write models.
features: File attachments and comments on tasks
Email and in-app notifications for task updates
deploymentStrategy: Containerized deployment on single VM with Docker Compose, migrating to Kubernetes as team grows
